CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Medicare Million Hearts Data File — Practice File
Version — May 2025
SAS name Label Type Length
PRACTICE_ID Model-Assigned Practice ID CHAR 9
BILLING_TIN Practice's Billing TIN CHAR 9
TINS List of Taxpayer Identification Numbers for the Practice CHAR 4000
NPIS List of National Provider Identifiers in the Practice CHAR 4000
PRACTICE_NAME Name of Practice CHAR 100
GROUP_TYPE Practice Group Type CHAR 100
CCNS List of CMS Certification Numbers
